import { jsx } from "react/jsx-runtime"; import { isServer } from "@tanstack/router-core/isServer"; import { useRouter } from "./useRouter.js"; function ScriptOnce({ children }) { const router = useRouter(); if (!(isServer ?? router.isServer)) { return null; } return /* @__PURE__ */ jsx( "script", { nonce: router.options.ssr?.nonce, dangerouslySetInnerHTML: { __html: children + ";document.currentScript.remove()" } } ); } export { ScriptOnce }; //# sourceMappingURL=ScriptOnce.js.map
